name: Facebook Graph API
description: Facebook's primary API for reading and writing to the social graph. Manage pages, publish posts, upload photos, read user profiles, and access page insights and analytics.

capabilities.name: get_user_profile
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's Facebook profile information including name, email, and profile picture.

capabilities.name: publish_page_post
capabilities.description: Create a new post on a Facebook Page with text content, links, or calls to action. Requires page access token.

capabilities.name: upload_photo
capabilities.description: Upload a photo to a Facebook Page or user album from a URL or binary data, with an optional caption.

capabilities.name: get_page_feed
capabilities.description: Retrieve recent posts from a Facebook Page's feed including post content, reactions count, and comment summaries.

capabilities.name: get_page_insights
capabilities.description: Fetch analytics and performance metrics for a Facebook Page such as reach, impressions, engagement, and follower growth.

capabilities.name: manage_page_comments
capabilities.description: Read comments on a Page post and reply to them. Useful for community management and customer engagement.
